title: ADDENDUM: ORRIGENDUM TO THE ADVERTISEMENT FOR REDESIGNING, SUPPLY,  INSTALLATION, TESTING AND COMMISSIONING OF REPLACED WOODEN  POLES WITH LATTICE TOWERS FOR 11KV, 33KV AND 66KV OVERHEAD LINES  LOCATED IN SWAMPY AREAS, RIVER AND ROAD CROSSING, AND  REPLACEMENT OF THE DAMAGED LATTICE TOWERS AND RECONDUCTORING OF THE 132 KV KAPICHIRA – NCHALO TRANSMISSION LINE
